productDisplayName: Highlander Men Red Blue Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, with red, white and black plaid checks with yellow and blue accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered logo, full length buttoned placket with red buttons, brand name appliqued on the bottom of the facing placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  red, white and black plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
